title: Implementing a RESTful API for a Complex Product Catalog
statement: Design, implement, and deploy a RESTful API using Express.js to manage a complex product catalog. The catalog consists of products, categories, and reviews. Your API should support CRUD operations for products, categories, and reviews, as well as filtering, sorting, and pagination for products. Additionally, implement API key-based rate limiting and authentication for reviews.
constraints: Must use only the in-memory array provided for storage
Must implement API key-based rate limiting with a limit of 100 requests per minute
Must implement authentication for reviews using a secret key

endpoints.description: Retrieves a list of products with filtering, sorting, and pagination support. Query parameters: limit, offset, category, name
Retrieves a single product by ID
Creates a new product. Request body: {name, description, price, categoryID}
Updates an existing product. Request body: {name, description, price, categoryID}
Retrieves a list of reviews for a product. Request query parameter: productID. Authentication required using a secret key in the 'Authorization' header
Creates a new review. Request body: {productID, rating, comment}. Authentication required using a secret key in the 'Authorization' header. Rate limiting applies
